name: Sheyenne Transport LLC
registry_source: SD Secretary of State (sosenterprise.sd.gov); USDA Rural Development success story confirming SD incorporation 2015
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER name search for 'SHEYENNE TRANSPORT' and 'SHEYENNE' returned zero records. Operates as intrastate SD school bus contractor in Webster (Day County), SD. Sister company to Duenwald Transportation LLC (USDOT 2316198, owned by same Duenwald family); Kevin Duenwald runs school bus routes in Webster. ~5 employees, ~$87K annual revenue.

name: KIKI School Bus Trnsprtn Corp
registry_source: NJ Dept of Education Pupil Transportation contractor codes (homeroom5.doe.state.nj.us); NJ Division of Revenue (njportal.com)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for 'KIKI SCHOOL BUS', 'KIKI SCHOOL', 'KIKI' all returned zero records. However, 'Kiki School Bus Trans Corp' is listed in NJ DOE 2020-21 and 2022-23 Pupil Transportation Contractor Code lists under county code 23 (Middlesex County, consistent with Perth Amboy) with contractor code B948 — confirming this is a legitimate, registered NJ intrastate school bus contractor. Address per source list: 364 Oak St, Perth Amboy, NJ 08861.

name: Gen Bus Mgmt Inc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue (njportal.com) — entity not located via public web search
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). SAFER searches for 'GEN BUS', 'GEN BUS MGMT', 'GEN BUS MANAGEMENT' all returned zero records. Not found in NJ DOE 2020-21 or 2022-23 Pupil Transportation Contractor Code lists. Address (1400 Hillside Dr, Cherry Hill, NJ 08003) is a residential property per Zillow/Movoto — suggests a small/home-based management entity rather than an operating bus fleet. May be a holding/admin shell related to a separately registered operating company; verification requires direct NJ business records lookup.

name: RNG Transport Inc
fmcsa_status: no FMCSA record matches NJ entity
registry_source: NJ Dept of Education Pupil Transportation contractor codes (homeroom5.doe.state.nj.us); NJ Division of Revenue (njportal.com)
notes: No USDOT match for the NJ entity (likely intrastate). SAFER name search returned three unrelated 'RNG TRANSPORT' carriers (USDOT 938571 Denver CO, USDOT 3015582 Baytown TX, USDOT 3037600 Nuevo CA) — none in NJ. 'RNG Transport' IS listed in NJ DOE 2020-21 and 2022-23 Pupil Transportation Contractor Code lists under county code 31 (Sussex County) with contractor code 8918 — confirms it is a registered NJ intrastate school bus contractor. Note: source row's hq/address fields were blank; Sussex County (not Cherry Hill / Camden) per DOE record.

name: James Collins Bus Svc LLC
fmcsa_status: no FMCSA record matches Cambridge MD bus entity
registry_source: MD State Dept of Assessments & Taxation (SDAT / Maryland Business Express) — not located via public web search
notes: No USDOT for this MD school bus entity (likely intrastate). SAFER 'JAMES COLLINS BUS' and 'JAMES COLLINS BUS SVC' searches returned no records. SAFER 'JAMES COLLINS' returned six carriers but none in MD/Cambridge/Dorchester (all in MI/NY/OR/IN/OK). A nearby USDOT 1109218 'JAMES COLLINS LLC' (Preston, MD — Caroline County, near Dorchester) is authorized for property only (livestock/chickens), not passengers, so does NOT match this school bus operator. Likely a small Cambridge MD/Dorchester County intrastate school bus contractor; the address 910 Washington St, Cambridge, MD 21613 is in the city core. SDAT direct lookup needed to confirm formation date and members.
